title: Slovakian Caraway Seed Cake
description: A traditional Slovakian cake made with caraway seeds, black treacle, and a touch of salt. Perfect as a breakfast or snack option.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Beat in the eggs, one at a time, until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, caraway seeds, and salt.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Add the black treacle and milk, and mix until well combined.
Pour the batter into a greased and floured cake tin.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the centre comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the tin for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
